post.description: Run synthetic data generation.

post.description:
Validate pending run config. Returns blockers, warnings, recommendations,
estimated rows, memory, and artifact summary.

schema.title: Response Api Validate Ge Api Validate Ge Post

schema.title: Response Api Reconcile Api Reconcile Post

get.description:
List artifacts. If run_id given, prefer registry from run records; else scan output dir.
type_filter: dataset|dbt|ge|airflow|contracts|manifest

schema.title: Response List Artifacts Api Artifacts Get

get.description: Download or serve an artifact file. path is relative to run output dir.

schema.title: Response Preview Sample Data Api Schema Preview Post

get.description:
Return schema structure as nodes and edges for graph visualization.
Provide either pack_id (domain pack) or custom_schema_id (custom schema).

parameters.name: custom_schema_id

schema.description: Custom schema ID from Schema Studio
schema.title: Custom Schema Id

schema.title: Response Visualize Schema Api Schema Visualize Get

Returns: { "sql": "CREATE TABLE ..." }

schema.title: Response Schema To Sql Api Schema To Sql Post

post.description:
Start async generation. Returns run_id immediately.

get.description: List runs with optional filters. Supports offset/limit and cursor pagination.

get.description:
Server-Sent Events stream for run status. Replaces polling when run is queued/running.
